name: Río 2 RPG
description:
This is basically a rpg about you being able to be a bird! Any bird that you choose, Owl, Pigeon, raven, Blue Macaw, etc! Let me know if there’s any mistakes since this is my first bot! If you want but most likely, based on your bird and choice, there are tribes or groups (whatever you want to call it, flocks!) but yeah!

Update: you can even be human, since nor everyone wants to be a bird!
creator: CharacterAiFan1235
